patch.value: GH-510: macOS nightly red — withTempPmPath skips realpath canonicalization; init-path-guard probe-root assertion fails (/var vs /private/var)

tests/helpers/withTempPmPath.ts canonicalizes mkdtemp output (fs.realpath) before use; init-path-guard.integration.spec.ts passes on macos-latest/Node 24; remaining test-side mkdtemp call sites swept for the same trap; next Nightly Validation run green on all matrices

## Evidence (Nightly Validation run 29142565592, commit 4b6ca51d, 2026-07-11)
- Only macos-latest / Node 24 red; 269/270 test files pass. Single failure: `tests/integration/init-path-guard.integration.spec.ts:167` (the GH-495 root-layout regression test).
- Assertion diff: expected `pm_root: /var/folders/.../pm-cli-test-BX16dC/root-layout-ws`, received `/private/var/folders/...` — macOS `/var` is a symlink to `/private/var`; `pm probe root --json` returns the canonical (realpath'd) root, the test compares against the logical mkdtemp path.
- Deterministic, NOT a flake: first nightly containing the test (merged with the GH-495 fix after the 07-10 nightly ran). PR CI matrices do not cover macOS, so it only surfaces nightly.

## Root cause
`tests/helpers/withTempPmPath.ts:314` creates the workspace via `mkdtemp(path.join(os.tmpdir(), "pm-cli-test-"))` WITHOUT canonicalizing. The identical class was fixed by pm-gf6f ("fixed macOS realpath mismatch by canonicalizing mkdtemp output") but only inside the extension-command unit spec — the shared integration helper never got the fix, so every future integration test comparing absolute paths re-inherits the trap.

## Fix shape
Canonicalize once at the source: `tempRoot = await realpath(await mkdtemp(...))` in withTempPmPath. Product behavior is correct (probe returning the canonical root is desirable identity semantics); this is test-infrastructure-side only. Sweep other `mkdtemp` sites under tests/ for the same omission while there.

author: maintainer-agent
message: link class precedent (pm-gf6f fixed same trap in unit spec only) and the GH-495 fix whose regression test surfaces it
